zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Cromwell於1460年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾維爾時，她的父親Sir John Cromwell22歲，母親Joan Smythe18歲。她於1482年之前與Edmund Mitchell在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1510年在英國賀特福爾可迪可特享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Cromwell于1460年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾維爾时，她的父亲Sir John Cromwell22岁，母亲Joan Smythe18岁。她于1482年之前与Edmund Mitchell在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1510年在英国賀特福爾可迪可特享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Cromwell was born in 1460, in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Cromwell, was 22 and her mother, Joan Smythe, was 18. She married Edmund Mitchell before 1482, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1510, in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Cromwell est née en 1460, à Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Cromwell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Smythe, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Mitchell avant 1482, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Codicote, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Cromwell 1460 in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Cromwell 22 und ihre Mutter Joan Smythe 18. Sie hat vor 1482 in Europa Edmund Mitchell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Cromwell è nata il nel 1460 nel Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Cromwell, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Joan Smythe, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Mitchell prima del 1482, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1510, nel Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cromwellが1460年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノーウエルで生まれた時，父Sir John Cromwellは22歳，母Joan Smytheは18歳であった。1482年以前にヨーロッパでEdmund Mitchellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアコディコトで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cromwell(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Cromwell(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Smythe(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1482년 이전 우럽에서 Edmund Mitchell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 허트퍼드실르 코딕트에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Cromwell nasceu em 1460, em Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Cromwell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Smythe, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Mitchell antes 1482, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Codicote, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Cromwell родилась в 1460 г. в местности норвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Cromwell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Smythe, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Mitchell перед 1482 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности кодикот, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Cromwell nació en 1460, en Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Cromwell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Smythe, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Edmund Mitchell antes de 1482, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1510, en Codicote, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
